title: CompiledQuery DTO (§8.2)
description: final readonly CompiledQuery DTO with sql, bindings, dialect, metadata. Constructor-promoted, JsonSerializable. Required by DataSourceConnector::execute() (§9.1) and produced by InternalQueryCompiler (§8). Tiny — no separate epic, file as standalone.
close_reason: Closed

title: ApplyAccessPolicies pipe — server-side tenant filter injection
description: Append required access policies as Filters on the SemanticQuery (so they flow through the compiler with bindings). Plan §17.2 'never depend only on frontend filters'.

title: Skeleton domain Actions per §3 (CRUD + factories of intent)
description: Create skeletons for: CreateDataSource, TestDataSourceConnection, IntrospectDataSource, CreateSemanticModel, AddMeasureToModel, AddDimensionToModel, AddJoinToModel, ValidateSemanticModel, CreateDashboard, AddChartToDashboard, PublishDashboard, GenerateEmbedToken, ResolveEmbedContext, RunSemanticQuery, CompileInternalSemanticQuery. Wire DI in a Service Provider. Real logic comes in later milestones.
close_reason: 15 skeleton actions wired across DataSources/SemanticModels/Dashboards/Embeds/Queries. CreateDataSource/CreateSemanticModel/AddMeasure/AddDimension/AddJoin/CreateDashboard/AddChart/PublishDashboard work end-to-end; M2+ actions throw RuntimeException placeholder. AnalyticsServiceProvider added to bootstrap/providers.php; CredentialVault binding moved there.

title: TestDataSourceConnection action with safe error redaction
description: Action wraps connector.testConnection() and translates raw exceptions into a sanitized ConnectionTestResult (no host:port leakage in error.message). Per §17.4 / §14.2 'failed connection returns safe error message'.

title: Migration: analytics_joins (§4.7) — explicit, limited
description: left_table_alias, left_column, right_table, right_table_alias, right_column, type (inner|left default left), relationship (one_to_one|many_to_one|one_to_many). V1 strongly prefers many_to_one fact→dimension joins.
close_reason: Migrations created and applied (sqlite, refresh-clean). See database/migrations/2026_06_23_19300*.php.

title: Migration: analytics_semantic_providers (§4.3)
description: ULID id, org FK, name, type ('internal'|'cube'|'dbt_semantic_layer'), nullable data_source_id FK, encrypted_config, capabilities json, idx(org,type).
close_reason: Migrations created and applied (sqlite, refresh-clean). See database/migrations/2026_06_23_19300*.php.

title: EmbedTokenManager — generate/decode HS256 JWT (§11.2)
description: Verbatim §11.2. firebase/php-jwt; key from config('embedlayer.embed_signing_key'); decode wraps Throwable as InvalidEmbedTokenException.

title: Embed security test suite (§18.4)
description: Pest scenarios: expired token, invalid signature, unauthorized dashboard, missing tenant context, disallowed field, invalid domain, valid token success.

title: PostgresConnector (§9.2)
description: Implement PostgresConnector exactly as §9.2: dynamic config(["database.connections.analytics_{id}" => ...]), DB::connection(), select against information_schema for introspect, capabilities supportsSql/Joins/DateTrunc=true.

title: AddAccessPolicy action — value_from_context rules only in V1
description: V1 supports rules of the form `{field, operator ∈ {=, in}, value_from_context}` (per §4.8 / §17.2). No DSL beyond this in V1 (§21).

title: V1 security & credential hygiene
description: Plan §11.3, §17.4. Encrypted creds at rest, never exposed to runtime; least-privilege docs; rotation support; audit connection tests & query runs; don't log sensitive bindings.

title: SqlDialect interface (§8.3)
description: Per §8.3: quoteIdentifier, dateTrunc(grain,expr), limitOffset(?int,?int), aggregate(type,expr), placeholder(position). SqlDialectResolver::forDataSource(DataSource) returns the right dialect by driver.

title: FieldValidator — semantic-field allowlist before compile
description: Validates every measure/dimension/filter field in SemanticQuery exists on the loaded SemanticModel and is is_public (or whitelisted). Raises UnknownSemanticFieldException / FieldNotPublicException before any SQL is generated.

title: Authorization policies (organization scoping)
description: Laravel Policies for DataSource, SemanticModel, Dashboard, Embed: every action scoped to user.organization_id == model.organization_id. Used by Livewire screens and embed APIs.
close_reason: Policies + ScopesByOrganization trait for DataSource/SemanticModel/Dashboard/Embed. users.organization_id column added. AnalyticsPolicyTest verifies cross-tenant denial.

title: Migrations: embeds, embed_domains, embed_tokens
description: Embeds: dashboard FK, name, default TTL, theme JSON. embed_domains: embed FK, host (no wildcards V1). embed_tokens: embed FK, jti, expires_at, external_account_id, payload hash for revocation/audit.
close_reason: Migrations created and applied (sqlite, refresh-clean). See database/migrations/2026_06_23_19300*.php.

title: M5: dashboard builder (Livewire) + chart types
description:
Plan §14.3 M5. Deliverables: dashboard/chart CRUD, chart query builder, chart preview, layout persistence; chart types: number_card, bar_chart, line_chart, table.

Exit criteria: user can build a dashboard with all four chart types; dashboard preview uses the same query pipeline as embed mode; chart cannot access fields not allowed by its model.

title: V1: prove embedded governed analytics end-to-end
description:
Smallest version that proves: connect a data source, define governed metrics/dimensions, build dashboards, embed into a host app, enforce tenant isolation, render customer-facing analytics.

Do NOT build in V1: AI, Cube/dbt adapters, NL queries, arbitrary SQL fields, complex join graphs, pre-aggregations, polished drag-drop builder, advanced cache engine. (Plan §14, §21)

title: Eloquent models + factories for every analytics_* table
description: Models: DataSource, SemanticProvider, SemanticModel, Measure, Dimension, Join, AccessPolicy, Dashboard, DashboardTab, Chart, ChartQuery, ChartLayout, Embed, EmbedDomain, EmbedToken, QueryRun, QueryCacheEntry. Each with belongsTo/hasMany + a factory + ULID generation.
close_reason: All 17 analytics_* Eloquent models + factories populated with HasUlids, Fillable attribute, casts, typed relations. Organization model extended with hasMany dataSources/semanticProviders/dashboards/embeds/queryRuns/queryCacheEntries. migrate:fresh + factory roundtrip green.

title: GenerateEmbedToken action — validate against saved Embed config
description: Action takes embed_id + external_account_id + filters + theme; cross-checks allowed_dashboard_ids/model_names against the persisted Embed row (per §11.3: 'token claims are not trusted blindly').

title: M4: deterministic query compiler (no SQLGlot)
description:
Plan §14.3 M4 + §8. Deliverables: SqlDialect contract + Postgres/MySQL/warehouse dialects + InternalQueryCompiler + FieldValidator + AccessPolicyCompiler.

Exit criteria: SemanticQuery compiles to parameterized SQL; tenant policy injected; unsupported grain/field/filter throws typed exception; generated SQL snapshot-tested per dialect.

title: M0: foundations — app/Analytics scaffold, base tables, credential vault
description: Cross-cutting foundations every other V1 milestone depends on: namespace scaffold per plan §3, org/project tables, embedlayer config, CredentialVault service. Not a milestone in the plan but breaking it out keeps M1 unblocked from a single huge task.
close_reason: All M0 children complete; V1 epic is sibling not child despite hierarchy.

title: DataSourceConnector contract + DTOs (§9.1)
description: App\Analytics\DataSources\Contracts\DataSourceConnector with testConnection(), introspect(), execute(CompiledQuery), capabilities(). DTOs: ConnectionTestResult, SchemaCatalog (+ Table/Column catalogs), DataSourceCapabilities (supportsSql, supportsJoins, supportsDateTrunc, supportedTimeGrains, dialect).
close_reason: Closed

title: Scaffold app/Analytics namespace per plan §3
description: Create app/Analytics with Actions/, DataSources/, Semantic/, Compiler/, Pipelines/, Security/, Support/ subtrees as laid out in §3. Add empty `.gitkeep`s where needed and a single namespace README pointing to the plan.
close_reason: Closed

title: M2: data source connectivity (Postgres, MySQL, one warehouse)
description:
Plan §14.3 M2 + §9. Deliverables: Postgres + MySQL + (BigQuery OR Snowflake) connectors, credential encryption, connection testing, schema introspection.

Exit criteria: user can connect, test, view discovered tables/columns; failed connection returns safe error.

title: Semantic DTOs: SemanticQuery, SemanticResult, ProviderContext, TimeDimension, Filter (§5)
description: final readonly DTOs per §5.1-5.3. Constructor-promoted; immutable; JsonSerializable. Filter has field/operator/value (+ value_from_context for access policies).
close_reason: Closed

title: Migration: analytics_measures (§4.5)
description: Per §4.5: name, label, description, type (count|count_distinct|sum|avg|min|max|ratio|calculated), column, expression json, filters json, format (currency|percent|number|duration), is_public, unique(model_id,name).
close_reason: Migrations created and applied (sqlite, refresh-clean). See database/migrations/2026_06_23_19300*.php.

title: Migrations: analytics_query_runs, analytics_query_cache_entries
description: query_runs per §19 (provider_type, model_name, dashboard/chart FK, status enum, duration_ms, cache_hit, query_shape json, error_message). cache_entries per §15.5 schema but in V1 (organization FK, cache_key unique, result json, metadata json, expires_at, last_accessed_at, idx(org, expires_at)).
close_reason: Migrations created and applied (sqlite, refresh-clean). See database/migrations/2026_06_23_19300*.php.

title: Migration: analytics_semantic_models (§4.4)
description: ULID id, org FK, semantic_provider_id FK cascade, name, label, description, base_table, base_table_alias, is_enabled, version int default 1, unique(provider_id, name).
close_reason: Migrations created and applied (sqlite, refresh-clean). See database/migrations/2026_06_23_19300*.php.

title: ValidateQueryPermissions pipe — disallowed-field guard
description: Per §10 sample. For every measure & dimension in the request, dashboard.allowsMeasure/allowsDimension must be true; else UnauthorizedSemanticFieldException. Allowed lists come from the Chart row, not the token.

title: ResolveEmbedContext — build ProviderContext from token
description: Decodes token, hydrates ProviderContext (organizationId, projectId, externalAccountId, embedId, claims). Reads the Embed row and intersects token claims with persisted config.

title: InternalSemanticProvider (§7) — implements SemanticProvider
description: Per §7: load model, FieldValidator, compile via InternalQueryCompiler, resolve connector via DataSourceConnectorManager, return SemanticResult. listModels/listFields hit SemanticModelRepository. capabilities() returns supportsExternalModels=false + dialect-derived time grains.

title: InternalQueryCompiler::compile (§8.4)
description: Implement the §8.4 reference compiler: SELECT (dimensions + time dimension dateTrunc + measure aggregates) FROM base_table AS alias JOIN... WHERE (filters AND access_policy) GROUP BY (dimensions + time-trunc expr) LIMIT/OFFSET. Returns CompiledQuery(sql, bindings, dialect, metadata).

title: AccessPolicyCompiler — bind tenant context as parameters
description: Compiles is_required access policies into (sql, bindings) where context values (e.g., external_account_id) are appended to bindings, never string-concatenated (§4.8). Returns ['', []] when no required policies.

title: ValidateSemanticModel action — pre-execution structural check
description: Walks the loaded model and asserts: base_table set, every measure references a defined column (or known measure for ratios), every dimension column belongs to a defined join alias or base table, every join target exists, at least one is_required access policy when model is enabled for embedding.

title: Migration: analytics_dimensions (§4.6)
description: type (string|number|boolean|time), column, table_alias nullable, is_filterable/is_groupable/is_public, allowed_time_grains json nullable, unique(model_id,name).
close_reason: Migrations created and applied (sqlite, refresh-clean). See database/migrations/2026_06_23_19300*.php.

title: PostgresDialect
description: Verbatim from §8.3: "-quoted identifiers (with "" escape), DATE_TRUNC('grain', expr), LIMIT/OFFSET, COUNT/SUM/AVG/MIN/MAX/COUNT(DISTINCT), '?' placeholder.

title: CredentialVault service (encrypt/decrypt + key rotation hooks)
description: App\Analytics\Security\CredentialVault wraps Laravel Crypt with: encryptDataSourceConfig(array), decryptDataSourceConfig(DataSource), encryptProviderConfig(array), decryptProviderConfig(SemanticProvider). Keys come from config/embedlayer; supports key rotation by re-encrypting on save.
close_reason: Implemented App\Analytics\Security\CredentialVault: AES-256-GCM, config-driven key (separate from APP_KEY), base64 key support, automatic rotation via previous_credential_encryption_keys, needsRotation() + rotate() helpers, singleton-bound in AppServiceProvider. Pest unit test covers round-trip, key isolation, rotation, fromConfig validation. Specialized encryptDataSourceConfig/encryptProviderConfig facade methods deferred until DataSource/SemanticProvider Eloquent models land (M1).

title: M3: internal semantic modeling (measures, dimensions, joins, policies)
description:
Plan §14.3 M3. Deliverables: model/measure/dimension/join/access-policy builders + model validator + preview query.

Exit criteria: user can define orders model + revenue/count measures + country/status/date dimensions; preview works; invalid fields rejected pre-execution.

title: EmbedTokenPayload DTO + claims schema (§11.1)
description: Claims: iss, sub, organization_id, project_id, embed_id, external_account_id, allowed_dashboard_ids[], allowed_model_names[], filters{}, theme{}, iat, exp. Strict toClaims/fromClaims round-trip with required-field validation.

title: Organizations, projects, teams base migrations + models
description: Migrations for organizations, teams, analytics_projects with ULID primary keys; Eloquent models + factories. All later analytics tables FK organization_id and project_id onto these.
close_reason: Closed

title: Create config/embedlayer.php with signing key, drivers, defaults
description: Add config/embedlayer.php exposing: embed_signing_key (env), default_ttl_seconds (300), enabled_drivers (postgres, mysql, bigquery|snowflake), enabled_providers (internal), default_row_limit, default_query_timeout_ms, allowed_origins. Read in config/services.php style.
close_reason: Closed

title: M1: core Laravel domain (migrations, models, actions, policies, factories)
description:
Plan §14.3 M1. Deliverables: projects, data_sources, semantic_providers, semantic_models, measures, dimensions, joins, dashboards, charts, embeds.

Exit criteria: migrations + factories + policies exist; base Livewire pages exist; domain actions covered by tests.
close_reason: All M1 children closed: migrations, models+factories, policies, skeleton actions.

title: EmbedLayer: customer-facing analytics platform
description:
Top-level epic tracking V1, V2, and V3 of EmbedLayer per embedlayer_v1_v3_technical_plan.md.

Goal: a customer-facing analytics platform SaaS companies embed into their own apps, backed by Laravel + Livewire control plane, Svelte/TypeScript embeddable runtime, an internal structured semantic layer, and external semantic-provider adapters (Cube, dbt SL).

Non-negotiable principles:
- No SQLGlot / no runtime SQL parsing.
- Chart builder works on semantic fields, not SQL.
- Every backend is a SemanticProvider.
- Runtime is backend-agnostic; tenant policies are server-side.

title: Migration: analytics_data_sources (§4.2)
description: ULID id, org FK, name, driver, encrypted_config json, capabilities json nullable, last_introspected_schema json nullable, last_tested_at, last_introspected_at, timestamps, idx(org, driver). Verbatim from §4.2.
close_reason: Migrations created and applied (sqlite, refresh-clean). See database/migrations/2026_06_23_19300*.php.

title: M6: embedding (token, iframe route, embed API, pipeline)
description:
Plan §14.3 M6 + §10 + §11. Deliverables: embed config + allowed domains + token gen + iframe route + embed API + QueryExecutionPipeline with tenant enforcement.

Exit criteria: external app loads iframe dashboard with valid token; expired/invalid/wrong-domain tokens fail; tenant context enforced; queries respect external account ID.

title: Migrations: dashboards, dashboard_tabs, charts, chart_queries, chart_layouts
description: Per §4.1 list. Charts ref dashboard + model + chart type (number_card|bar_chart|line_chart|table). chart_queries stores the SemanticQuery JSON. chart_layouts stores grid coords/sizes.
close_reason: Migrations created and applied (sqlite, refresh-clean). See database/migrations/2026_06_23_19300*.php.

title: DECISION: BigQuery vs Snowflake for V1 warehouse
description: Pick ONE warehouse for V1. Trade-offs: BigQuery (service account JSON, free tier easier for OSS demos, dialect more divergent) vs Snowflake (account/role/warehouse/user, more enterprise-y, paid only). Plan §14.2 explicitly says ONE of the two in V1.
notes: Decision 2026-06-23 (Kevin Kabeya): support BOTH BigQuery AND Snowflake in V1. Plan §14.2 'pick one' is overridden — both connectors and dialects are V1 scope. el-d1i and el-x7w are kept; child beads will be split if needed.
close_reason: Resolved: BOTH BigQuery and Snowflake are V1 scope.

title: QueryExecutionPipeline + all pipes (§10)
description: Laravel Pipeline order from §10: ValidateEmbedToken → ResolveTenantContext → ResolveDashboardContext → ValidateQueryPermissions → ApplyAccessPolicies → ResolveSemanticProvider → CheckCache → ExecuteSemanticQuery → NormalizeResult → StoreResultCache. SemanticQueryRequest payload per §10.

title: Migration: analytics_access_policies (§4.8)
description: Per-model rules json, is_required default true.
close_reason: Migrations created and applied (sqlite, refresh-clean). See database/migrations/2026_06_23_19300*.php.

title: QueryCacheKey::make (§14.2) — tenant-aware sha256
description: Verbatim §14.2: hash(sha256, json_encode({organization_id, project_id, external_account_id, chart_id, query})). Document JSON canonicalization (sorted keys) so equivalent queries hash identically.

title: Sanitize sensitive query bindings out of logs and query_runs
description: Per §17.4 'avoid logging SQL bindings if they contain sensitive values' + §19 'do not store raw sensitive query bindings'. Add a redaction filter pass on logger context.

title: Per-dialect SQL snapshot test suite (§18.2)
description: Pest snapshot tests covering: each aggregate, each time grain, tenant policy injection, ratio measure, joined dimension. Run per dialect.

title: MySqlDialect (no DATE_TRUNC — use DATE_FORMAT/equivalent)
description: Backtick-quote identifiers; emulate DATE_TRUNC via DATE_FORMAT for each supported grain or use DATE_SUB(... INTERVAL ...) tricks. Document the chosen approach in design notes.

title: Chart type registry: number_card, bar_chart, line_chart, table
description: Server-side ChartType registry: declares required SemanticResult shape (e.g., number_card → 1 measure, 0 dimensions; bar_chart → ≥1 dimension + ≥1 measure). Used by chart builder validation and runtime renderer adapters.

title: V2: DbtSemanticLayerProvider adapter (§15.4)
description: SemanticProvider over dbt Semantic Layer GraphQL. Map internal model concept ↔ metric namespace; metric ↔ measure; dimension ↔ dimension; filter ↔ where/group-by constraint.

title: AddJoinToModel — explicit, prefer many_to_one
description: Persists analytics_joins. Warns on one_to_many; rejects cycles between joins (per §17.1 fanout mitigation). V1 strongly biases many_to_one fact→dimension.

title: Scaffold packages/embed-runtime (Vite + Svelte + TS)
description: Per §12. packages/embed-runtime with src/index.ts, components/, api/, charts/adapters/, types/. Vite library mode build → dist/embed.js consumable by both iframe shell and (later) host pages.

title: ChartRenderer + adapters: NumberCard, BarChart, LineChart, TableChart
description: One adapter per chart type. Lightweight charting (D3 primitives or layercake) — avoid heavy chart libs in V1. Adapter signature: (columns, rows, options) → mounted Svelte component.

title: AddDimensionToModel + time-dimension grains
description: Validates type ∈ {string, number, boolean, time}; time dimensions require allowed_time_grains ⊆ {day, week, month, quarter, year}.

title: GET /embed/dashboards/{id} — iframe entry point
description: Validates token (query string), renders blade shell that boots the Svelte runtime (m7) with the dashboard payload preloaded. Inline CSP that restricts framing to allowed domains.

title: Query timeout + default row limit enforcement at connector layer
description: Set per-connection statement_timeout (Postgres), max_execution_time (MySQL), job timeout (warehouse). Inject default row limit from config if SemanticQuery has none. Surface QueryTimeoutException.

title: IntrospectDataSource action — persist schema catalog
description: Runs connector.introspect(), serializes SchemaCatalog → analytics_data_sources.last_introspected_schema; stamps last_introspected_at; emits a domain event.

title: M7: minimal Svelte/TypeScript embedded runtime
description:
Plan §14.3 M7 + §12. Deliverables: chart renderer, dashboard loader, filter state, loading/error states, theme config; ships inside the iframe initially.

Exit criteria: runtime renders dashboard in iframe; calls Laravel embed API; runtime does NOT know provider type; runtime accepts only token + dashboardId.

title: CreateDashboard / AddChartToDashboard / PublishDashboard
description: Action triplet. AddChartToDashboard persists a Chart + ChartQuery (the SemanticQuery JSON) + ChartLayout. PublishDashboard flips is_published and validates every chart's SemanticQuery passes FieldValidator.

title: V1 caching by semantic-query hash
description: Plan §14.2. Cache result by hash(org_id, project_id, external_account_id, chart_id, query); TTL default 5min; per-chart TTL; CheckCache/StoreResultCache pipes. No pre-aggregation in V1.

title: CreateSemanticModel action + model repository
description: Persists analytics_semantic_models row tied to a semantic provider (and through it, optionally a data source). SemanticModelRepository::findForQuery(orgId, modelName) loads the full graph (model + measures + dimensions + joins + policies).

title: Warehouse dialect (BigQuery OR Snowflake per m2-warehouse-decision)
description: If BigQuery: backtick identifiers, DATE_TRUNC(DATE(expr), DAY|WEEK|...) per §8.3. If Snowflake: "-quoted identifiers, DATE_TRUNC('grain', expr).

title: CheckCache + StoreResultCache pipes
description: CheckCache: if hit and !expired, populate SemanticQueryRequest::$result + cacheHit=true and short-circuit. StoreResultCache: on miss, persist result + expires_at = now+TTL. Per-chart TTL falls back to config default.

title: EmbedLayerDashboard.svelte — loader + layout
description: Loads dashboard, fans out chart queries in parallel, renders ChartRenderer per chart, listens to FilterBar changes, debounces refetch.

title: Allowed-origin enforcement (CORS + Referer/Origin check) on embed routes
description: Middleware compares request Origin/Referer against analytics_embed_domains for the embed. Reject with 403 on mismatch. (§18.4 'invalid domain' test must pass.)

title: Persist analytics_query_runs from the pipeline (§19)
description: After ExecuteSemanticQuery / on exception, write a query_runs row: provider_type, model_name, dashboard_id, chart_id, status, duration_ms, cache_hit, query_shape (NO bindings), error_message (sanitized).

title: Livewire screens: create data source, test, introspect, view schema
description: Flux-based Livewire pages: list data sources, create wizard (per-driver fields), Test button, Introspect button, schema browser tree.

title: NormalizeResult pipe — provider-agnostic column/row shape
description: Coerces SemanticResult into the canonical {columns:[{key,label,type}], rows:[{k:v}]} shape from §2.4. Annotates metadata with provider_type, cache_hit, query_time_ms — but never with SQL or credentials.

title: V2: <embed-layer-dashboard/> web component runtime (§15.2)
description: Move beyond iframe-only: custom element registration, shadow DOM/scoped styles, responsive height, global + chart-level filters, drilldown events, host callbacks (onFilterChange, onChartClick, onError), theme tokens, loading skeletons, error boundaries.

title: V2: framework-neutral embed + external semantic providers + governance
description: Web-component runtime, Cube adapter, dbt Semantic Layer adapter, stronger caching, versioning/publish workflow, governance. (Plan §15)

title: EmbedLayerApiClient (§12.3) with retry/error policy
description: loadDashboard(id) and runChartQuery(dashId, chartId, filters). Token in Authorization header. Surfaces typed errors to onError host callback (V2) and to default error boundary.

title: V2: model + dashboard versioning + publish workflow (§15.6)
description: Add analytics_semantic_model_versions + analytics_dashboard_versions; dashboards pin to a published model version so model edits don't break customer-facing embeds.

title: V2: CubeSemanticProvider adapter (§15.3)
description: Implement SemanticProvider over Cube REST. CubeFieldMapper translates SemanticQuery↔Cube query. Cube remains source-of-truth for Cube-backed models; cache metadata only.

title: MySqlConnector
description: Mirror PostgresConnector for MySQL. introspect() uses information_schema.columns. Capabilities: supportsDateTrunc=false (use DATE_FORMAT in MySqlDialect).

title: Dashboard preview reuses embed query pipeline
description: Preview routes go through the same QueryExecutionPipeline as embeds — same FieldValidator, AccessPolicyCompiler, cache. Difference: ProviderContext is built from the authenticated org user, not an embed token.

title: Embed API: GET /api/embed/dashboards/{id} + POST .../charts/{id}/query
description: Bearer-token auth middleware uses ResolveEmbedContext. Endpoints return DashboardPayload and ChartResultPayload per §2.4. Never returns SQL, credentials, or provider type.

title: AddMeasureToModel + measure type validation
description: Validates: type ∈ {count, count_distinct, sum, avg, min, max, ratio}; column required for column-aggregates; expression.numerator+denominator required for ratio; calculated metrics reference existing measures only (NO arbitrary SQL — plan §4.5).

title: V1 observability: query_runs + duration + cache hit/miss
description: Plan §19. Persist analytics_query_runs from V1: provider type, dashboard/chart id, tenant id, status, duration, cache hit, error type, timeout flag. No raw bindings unless privacy model exists.

title: Warehouse connector (BigQuery OR Snowflake — per decision)
description: Implement the connector chosen in m2-warehouse-decision. Encrypted creds via CredentialVault. introspect() must populate SchemaCatalog the same way the SQL connectors do.

title: TypeScript types: DashboardPayload, ChartResultPayload, SemanticQuery, Filter
description: Mirror the Laravel API response shapes from §2.4 and §6. Single source of truth for runtime; later generate from a backend OpenAPI spec.

title: V3: natural-language → SemanticQuery (§16.3)
description: NL compiles to SemanticQuery, NEVER to SQL. Routed through the standard pipeline so governance applies.

title: V3: multi-provider dashboards (§16.5)
description: Dashboard can combine charts from internal + Cube + dbt SL. Provider-aware chart config, cross-provider filter normalization, per-provider cache, error isolation — one chart's failure must not break the dashboard.

title: FilterBar.svelte + filter state store
description: Date-range + categorical filters; emits SemanticQuery-compatible filter objects to the dashboard component. Filter state persisted in URL hash for shareable iframe links.

title: Livewire: model + measure + dimension + join + policy editors
description: Plan §13.1 MeasureEditor as the template; extend to dimensions, joins, policies. Uses Flux form components; alpha_dash validation on names.

title: iframe bundle wiring + CDN deployment path
description: Vite build outputs to public/embed/embed.js (served by Laravel) for V1; document CDN path for V2 (cdn.embedlayer.com).

title: docker-compose Postgres + MySQL for integration tests (§18.3)
description: tests/docker-compose.yml with seeded Postgres + MySQL; Pest test base class that boots containers and points test DataSource rows at them.

title: Preview semantic query in builder (uses real pipeline)
description: Builder button runs a small SemanticQuery via the same RunSemanticQuery action used in embed mode, returning ≤100 rows. Confirms 'preview uses the same query pipeline as embed mode' (§14.3 M5 exit criteria).

title: V2: cache warming, SWR, per-chart/provider TTL, invalidation (§15.5)
Credential rotation support in CredentialVault + Livewire flow
description: Rotate-key action re-encrypts every encrypted_config row with a new key, with safe rollback. Surface a 'Rotate credentials' control on the data source detail page.

title: V3: governed analytics application platform (AI, NL, pre-aggs, multi-provider)
description: AI-assisted model/dashboard creation, NL → SemanticQuery, pre-aggregations, multi-provider dashboards, metric testing, anomaly detection. AI is suggestion-only; validation stays deterministic. (Plan §16)

title: V3: AI-assisted semantic model creation (§16.2)
description: AI suggests measures/dimensions/labels from schema introspection. Output is structured JSON; human reviews; validation stays deterministic; AI cannot publish production models.

title: Docs: read-only DB user setup per supported driver
description: README-style doc giving the exact GRANT / role for Postgres, MySQL, and the chosen warehouse so customers connect with least privilege (§17.4).

title: Loading skeletons + error boundaries per chart
description: Each chart shows skeleton during fetch, error card on failure (one chart's failure must not break the dashboard — same isolation principle as §16.5).

title: Livewire: dashboard list/CRUD/preview + chart CRUD
description: Dashboard pages with chart-add modal, simple grid layout, preview button. Layout persists to analytics_chart_layouts.

title: V3: pre-aggregations / summary tables (§16.4)
description: Pre-aggregation definitions; per-dialect CREATE TABLE AS / materialized views; refresh jobs; query planner chooses aggregate when compatible.

title: Livewire screen: recent query runs (per org)
